---
title: "Hockey Shot Analysis"
author: "Julian Fitz"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    echo: false
    execute: false
---

## data prep
```{r}
#| include: false
#| execute: true
library(tidyverse)
library(nhlscraper)  ## hockey data -- some other data from
library(sportyR) ## visualize regualation playing surfaces for sports
library(here)
library(shiny)
```

```{r grab game data}
#| execute: true
## canucks April 1st upset of the Avs

# pbps <- gc_pbps(season = 20252026)

# saveRDS(pbps, file = "2025season.rds")

pbps <- readRDS(here("data/2025season.rds"))

# pbps |> filter(typeDescKey == "goal") |> head()
```

```{r grab shot data}
#| execute: true
## shot data from moneypuck.com
shots_df <- read_csv(here("data/shots_2025.csv"))
# shots_df |> select(awayTeamCode) |> unique()

## moneypuck data for canucks april 1st upset against the avalanch
avs_vs_canucks <- shots_df |> filter(awayTeamCode == "VAN") |> filter(homeTeamCode == "COL") |> filter(game_id == 21188)
```

```{r goal locations}
# head(avs_vs_canucks)
AvC_goal_df <- avs_vs_canucks |> filter(event == "GOAL")

geom_hockey("nhl") + 
  geom_point(data = avs_vs_canucks |> filter(period == 1), 
             aes(x = arenaAdjustedXCord,
                 y = arenaAdjustedYCord)) +
  geom_point(data = AvC_goal_df |> filter(period == 1),
             aes(x = arenaAdjustedXCord,
                 y = arenaAdjustedYCord,
                 color = teamCode),
             size = 5)


# pbps |> group_by(reason) |> summarise(n = n()) |> arrange(desc(n)) |> head()
# pbps |> filter(gameId == 2025020020) |> filter(reason == "") |> head()



# pbps |> filter(gameId == 2025020020) |> nrow()
# pbps |> filter(gameId == 2025020020, !is.na(shotType)) |> nrow()
# pbps |> filter(gameId == 2025020020, !is.na(shotType), period == 1) |> nrow()
# pbps |> filter(gameId == 2025020020, !is.na(shotType), period == 1, typeDescKey == "goal") |> nrow()
```

```{r plot_df}
### IGNORES SPORTYR RINK COORDS
plot_df <- pbps |>
  filter(
    !is.na(shotType),
    period %in% c(1, 2, 3),
    typeDescKey %in% c("shot-on-goal", "goal")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    home_def_side = homeTeamDefendingSide,
    shooting_attacks_side = case_when(
      isHome & home_def_side == "right" ~ "left",
      isHome & home_def_side == "left"  ~ "right",
      !isHome & home_def_side == "right" ~ "right",
      !isHome & home_def_side == "left" ~ "left",
      TRUE ~ "right"
    ),
    net_x = if_else(shooting_attacks_side == "right", 89, -89),
    net_y = 0,
    dx = net_x - xCoord,
    dy = net_y - yCoord,
    angle_rink = atan2(dy, dx),
    radius_rink = sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2),
    gameId = as.character(gameId)
  )


library(plotly)
# plot_df |> mutate(attack_code = case_when(
#  isHome == TRUE ~ TRUE))



## ai used to alter previous plot setup - claude sonnet 4.6
## why: unable to add global aesthetics to geom_hockey() preventing propper use of plotly
#p1 <- geom_hockey("nhl") +   # swap in your data
#  plot_df +
#  aes(x = xCoord, y = yCoord, color = isHome) +   # removed from each geom - changed by 
#  geom_point(aes(shotType = shotType, strengthState = strengthState)) +
#  geom_spoke(aes(angle = angle_rink, radius = radius_rink)) +
#  facet_wrap(~ period) +
#  theme_void()

# ggplotly(p1, tooltip = c("shotType", "strengthState"))
## convert deg to radians and draw a line from the shot position in the angle they shot at
```

## shiny app
```{r shiny app}
#| execute: true

game_lookup <- shots_df |>
  distinct(game_id, homeTeamCode, awayTeamCode) |>
  mutate(pbps_game_id = as.integer(game_id + 2025000000)) |>
  arrange(game_id)

all_teams <- sort(unique(c(game_lookup$homeTeamCode, game_lookup$awayTeamCode)))

ui <- fluidPage(
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput("home_team",
                  label = "Home Team",
                  choices = all_teams
      ),
      selectInput("away_team",
                  label = "Away Team",
                  choices = NULL
      ),
      selectInput("gameId_sel",
                  label = "Select Game",
                  choices = NULL
      ),
      checkboxGroupInput("period_sel",
                         label = "Select Game Period(s)",
                         choices = c(1, 2, 3),
                         selected = c(1, 2, 3)
      ),
      checkboxGroupInput("event_sel",
                         label = "Select Shot Result(s)",
                         choices = c("GOAL", "SHOT", "MISS"),
                         selected = c("GOAL", "SHOT", "MISS")
      ),
      radioButtons("heatmap_team",
                   label = "Heatmap: Shots By",
                   choices = c("Home" = 1, "Away" = 0),
                   selected = 1
      )
    ),
    mainPanel(
      plotlyOutput(outputId = "shot_map"),
      plotOutput(outputId = "heat_map"),
      plotOutput(outputId = "event_bar")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # Update away team choices when home team changes
  observeEvent(input$home_team, {
    away_choices <- game_lookup |>
      filter(homeTeamCode == input$home_team) |>
      pull(awayTeamCode) |>
      unique() |>
      sort()
    updateSelectInput(session, "away_team", choices = away_choices)
  })

  # Update game choices when either team changes
  observeEvent(list(input$home_team, input$away_team), {
    req(input$home_team, input$away_team) ## AI USED to figure out req() is needed
    matching <- game_lookup |>
      filter(homeTeamCode == input$home_team, awayTeamCode == input$away_team)
    req(nrow(matching) > 0) ## ai used to find req() is needed
    labels <- if (nrow(matching) > 1) {
      paste0(input$home_team, " vs ", input$away_team, " (Game ", seq_len(nrow(matching)), ")")
    } else {
      paste0(input$home_team, " vs ", input$away_team)
    }
    updateSelectInput(session, "gameId_sel", choices = setNames(matching$pbps_game_id, labels))
  })

  
  df_game_selected <- reactive({
    plot_df |>
      filter(gameId == input$gameId_sel)
  })
  
  # Map SHOT/GOAL/MISS choices to typeDescKey values used in plot_df
  event_map <- c("SHOT" = "shot-on-goal", "GOAL" = "goal")
  
  df_period_selected <- reactive({
    mapped_events <- event_map[input$event_sel[input$event_sel %in% names(event_map)]]
    df_game_selected() |>
      filter(period %in% as.integer(input$period_sel)) |>
      filter(typeDescKey %in% mapped_events)
  })
  
  # Base reactive: game + period + event filters applied to shots_df
  df_events <- reactive({
    shots_df |>
      filter(game_id == as.integer(input$gameId_sel) - 2025000000) |>
      filter(period %in% as.numeric(input$period_sel)) |>
      filter(event %in% input$event_sel)
  })

  df_heatmap <- reactive({
    df_events() |>
      filter(isHomeTeam == as.integer(input$heatmap_team)) |>
      filter(
        !is.na(arenaAdjustedXCord),
        !is.na(arenaAdjustedYCord)
      )
  })
  
  output$shot_map <- renderPlotly({
    req(input$gameId_sel) ## ai used to find req() is needed
    geom_hockey("nhl") +
      df_period_selected() +
      aes(x = xCoord, y = yCoord, color = isHome) +
      geom_point(aes(shotType = shotType, strengthState = strengthState)) +
      geom_spoke(aes(angle = angle_rink, radius = radius_rink)) +
      theme_void(base_size = 22)
  })
  
  output$heat_map <- renderPlot({
    req(input$gameId_sel)
    geom_hockey(league = "NHL", display_range = "ozone") +
  stat_density_2d_filled(
    data = df_heatmap(),
    aes(
      x = arenaAdjustedXCord,
      y = arenaAdjustedYCord,
      fill = after_stat(level)
    ),
    contour_var = "density",
    alpha = 0.75
  ) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(25, 100), ylim = c(-42.5, 42.5)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(direction = 1) +
  theme_void(base_size = 22) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Shot density —", if (input$heatmap_team == 1) input$home_team else input$away_team),
    subtitle = paste("Periods:", paste(input$period_sel, collapse = ", ")),
    fill = "Density"
  )
    
  })

  
  ## Posit Assistant used to transfer plot from slide to shiny
  output$event_bar <- renderPlot({
    req(input$gameId_sel) ## req() added - ai used to find issue (crash on startup without)
    df_events() |>
      mutate(
        team_label = teamCode,
        event_label = case_when(
          event == "GOAL" ~ "Goal",
          event == "SHOT" ~ "Shot",
          event == "MISS" ~ "Miss",
          TRUE ~ event
        ),
        period_lab = factor(paste0("Period ", period),
                            levels = paste0("Period ", sort(unique(period))))
      ) |>
      count(period_lab, team_label, event_label) |>
      ggplot(aes(x = period_lab, y = n, fill = event_label)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge") +
      facet_wrap(~ team_label) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Shot" = "#9ecae1", "Goal" = "#f28e2b", "Miss" = "#b2b2b2")) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 22) +
      labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "Events",
        fill = "Event Type"
      ) +
      theme(
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
        legend.position = "bottom"
      )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```

```{r heatmap of goals against Avalanch}
heatmap_df <- shots_df |>
  filter(homeTeamCode == "COL" | awayTeamCode == "COL") |>
  filter(event %in% c("GOAL", "SHOT")) |>
  mutate(
    opponent = if_else(
      homeTeamCode == "COL",
      awayTeamCode,
      homeTeamCode
    ),
    shot_results_in_goal = if_else(event == "GOAL", 1L, 0L)
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(arenaAdjustedXCord),
    !is.na(arenaAdjustedYCord)
  )

# shots_df |> colnames()

geom_hockey(league = "NHL", display_range = "ozone") +
  stat_density_2d_filled(
    data = heatmap_df,
    aes(
      x = arenaAdjustedXCord,
      y = arenaAdjustedYCord,
      fill = after_stat(level)
    ),
    contour_var = "density",
    alpha = 0.75
  ) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(25, 100), ylim = c(-42.5, 42.5)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(direction = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Shot density against Colorado",
    subtitle = "All SHOT and GOAL events by opponents",
    fill = "Density"
  )

```

```{r}
## shot type bar plot
## !!! game id in pbps does not match game id in shots_df!!!!

ggplot(shots_df |> filter(game_id == 20001), aes(x = event)) +
  geom_bar()
```


```{r game flow}
# thought
# use geom_line to show shots on goal, danger of shots on goal, expected goals, and/or goals -- as the game progresses
```
